signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (Trading Economics) or 2.16% (RateInflation), up from 2.0% in February.**[2][3]

This represents the latest confirmed monthly data release around early April 2026, showing a slight acceleration from prior months but below some market forecasts of 2.4%.[2][3]
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: NO** | **MED** confidence
signals.raw:
NO** | **MED** confidence  
No resolutions, policy announcements, or events confirmed today that would notably move prediction markets; data aligns with ongoing trends near the Bank of Korea's 2% target, with prior readings at 2.3% annual for 2024 and December 2025.[1][2]

signals.headline: Chris Dudley Announces GOP Bid for Oregon Governor | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Chris Dudley Announces GOP Bid for Oregon Governor | NO | HIGH confidence**

Chris Dudley, former Portland Trail Blazers player who nearly won in 2010, formally entered the Republican primary for Oregon governor on January 26, 2026, criticizing state education, affordability, and public safety while facing rivals like Christine Drazan and an uphill battle against incumbent Democrat Tina Kotek.[1][
matched_markets: Will the White House call a full lid by 6:30PM on April 14?

signals.headline: Solana Teases XRP Integration | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Teases XRP Integration | YES | MED confidence**  
A cryptic post on April 16 hints at bringing Ripple's XRP to Solana, potentially boosting interoperability and ecosystem growth amid Solana's bullish momentum.[6]

signals.headline: XRP Leads Crypto Inflows at $119
signals.raw:
XRP Leads Crypto Inflows at $119.6M (Strongest Since Dec 2025) | YES | HIGH confidence**  
XRP unseated Bitcoin and Solana for largest weekly inflows into digital asset products ($224M total), with YTD at 7% of AUM amid regulatory clarity.[2]
